SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class TableController

java.lang.Object
server.controller.TableController
public class TableController extends Object
Controller class responsible for handling Table-related requests. Manages operations such as fetching tables, assigning tables to orders (check-in), and CRUD operations (Create, Update, Delete) for tables.

      public TableController()

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException
      Main handler method that processes incoming requests for the TABLE resource. Dispatches the request to the specific handler based on the ActionType.
      Parameters:
      req - The client's request object.
      client - The connection to the client.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • handleGetAll

      private void handleGetAll(ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException, SQLException
      Retrieves all tables from the database and sends them to the client. Also broadcasts the updated list to all connected clients.
      Parameters:
      client - The client requesting the list.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • handleGetTable

      private void handleGetTable(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException, SQLException
      Handles the check-in process for a customer. Verifies the order using confirmation code and subscriber code, finds an available table, and updates the order status to SEATED.
      Parameters:
      req - The request containing confirmation code and subscriber ID.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • handleCreate

      private void handleCreate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException, SQLException
      Creates a new table in the database. Verifies if the table number already exists before adding.
      Parameters:
      req - The request containing the new Table object.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • handleUpdate

      private void handleUpdate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException, SQLException
      Updates an existing table in the database.
      Parameters:
      req - The request containing the updated Table object.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • handleDelete

      private void handleDelete(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException, SQLException
      Deletes a table from the database based on the ID provided in the request.
      Parameters:
      req - The request containing the ID of the table to delete.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • sendTablesToAllClients

      private void sendTablesToAllClients() throws SQLException, IOException
      Helper method to broadcast the current list of tables to all connected clients. Used to keep clients in sync after changes.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
